message:
🐛 Fix feedback dialog re-opening on navigation, add docs link on title (#2046)

- Add useRef guard in IssueRedirect/FeatureRedirect to dispatch custom
  event only once, preventing re-trigger when navigate reference changes
- Sync requestType in FeatureRequestModal when initialRequestType prop
  changes (fixes /feature route opening on wrong tab)
- Make "KubeStellar Console" title text link to docs in new tab

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -62,11 +62,16 @@ export function Navbar() { alt="KubeStellar" className="w-8 h-8 md:w-9 md:h-9" /> -
- KubeStellar Console - multi-cluster first, saving time and tokens -
+ + KubeStellar Console + multi-cluster first, saving time and tokens + {/* Search - hidden on small mobile */}
